title: MATERNAL MENTAL HEALTH AND SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: WELLMAMA MATERNAL MENTAL HEALTH AND SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support, support groups, and wellness services to people affected by or at risk for mental health conditions related to parenthood. Support people, including partners and babies under age 1, are welcome at all meetings. 576 Olive Street Suite 205 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Families struggling with emotions related to reproductive health, such as pregnancy, the first few years postpartum, and perinatal loss Hours: Support group times vary Email (541) 525-0495 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Text (541) 525-0495 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: In-person services: Cities of Coburg, Eugene, Lowell, Springfield, and Veneta Phone and online services: State of Oregon Services: Bereaved Parent Support Groups Peer Counseling Pregnancy/Childbirth Support Groups Specialized Information and Referral * Perinatal Depression Talklines/Warmlines * Perinatal Depression If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WELLMAMA
